articles.title: Novelis commissions first electric pusher furnace at Sierre plant
articles.summary: Novelis has commissioned its first electric pusher furnace at its Sierre, Switzerland plant, replacing a gas-fired unit. The new furnace reduces energy consumption by approximately 25% compared to the gas predecessor.

articles.title: Trimet expands recycling capabilities for closed material loops
articles.summary: Trimet's new facility will recycle around 70,000 tonnes of post-consumer aluminium scrap annually, feeding approximately 120,000 tonnes of extrusion ingot production using advanced sorting methods.
articles.novelis_angle: Trimet's European post-consumer scrap expansion increases competition for secondary aluminium feedstock that Novelis depends on to hit its 75% recycled content target by 2030.

articles.title: EU considers broader CBAM scope for aluminium products; industry concern intensifies
articles.summary: The EU is weighing extending CBAM to approximately 180 additional aluminium- and steel-based downstream product categories from January 2028; industry associations have raised concerns about downstream competitiveness and leakage risk.
articles.novelis_angle: A broader CBAM scope covering semi-finished and finished aluminium products would disadvantage third-country can sheet and automotive sheet importers, strengthening Novelis's position as a high-recycled-content European FRP producer.

articles.title: Global aluminium production drops 1.6% quarter-on-quarter in Q1 2026
articles.summary: Global primary aluminium output fell 1.6% quarter-on-quarter in Q1 2026, with declines in Africa, the Gulf, South America, and Oceania; demand remained resilient, sustaining supply tightness.
articles.novelis_angle: Sustained supply-side tightness keeps P1020 prices and European premiums elevated, directly affecting the primary metal input cost base for the share of Novelis production not covered by recycled scrap.
